topStories.description: President Donald Trump, when asked about the helicopters flying by his friend's house said: "They like Kid Rock. I like Kid Rock."

topStories.title: SC panel deprecates Rajasthan govt for ‘unabated’ contamination of Jojari-Luni-Bandi river system

topStories.title: US journalist Shelly Kittleson kidnapped in Baghdad
topStories.description: The US state department says a suspect in her abduction has ties to an Iran-backed militia group, Kataib Hezbollah.

topStories.description: Despite political tensions between the US and UK, the King will travel to Washington next month.

topStories.title: Who is Shelly Kittleson? Manhunt underway for captors after US journalist kidnapped in Baghdad - 5 points to know
topStories.description: Two Iraqi security officials – who spoke on the condition of anonymity said the journalist, Shelly Kittleson was abducted from central Baghdad’s Saadoun Street. Here's all you need to know about her and the kidnapping

topStories.title: US Stocks today: Dow Jones soars 1,125 points, Nasdaq, S&P 3% as Iran war de-escalation seen
topStories.description: Wall Street surged Tuesday as speculation of a de-escalation in the Middle East conflict eased oil price and inflation fears. Major indexes rallied following reports of President Trump's willingness to end military action against Iran. Investors are seeking indications of a normalized energy flow through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.description: Speaking to Al Jazeera, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said, "I receive messages from Witkoff directly, as before, and this does not mean that we are in negotiations."

dailyNews.title: US Labor dept's new proposed rule allows private equity, crypto in 401(k) plans — Here's all we know

dailyNews.title: Amid Iran War, Pete Hegseth Makes 'Secret' Gulf Visit to Meet US Troops
dailyNews.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said troops deployed in the Middle East remain committed to a long fight, driven by a sense of purpose.

dailyNews.title: Iran war fallout: JetBlue Airways increases check-in bag fees as fuel prices go up - How other airlines are responding
dailyNews.description: The check-in baggage prices have been increased at least $4. During non-peak hours, JetBlue will charge $39 for the first bag on domestic, Caribbean, and Latin America routes. The price was earlier $35.

dailyNews.title: IRS' 15 April tax deadline nears: Here is a list of common mistakes to avoid while filing taxes
dailyNews.description: As the tax filing deadline gets close for US citizens, here's a list of common mistakes to avoid.

dailyNews.title: Luke Bryan credits religious roots and small-town values for helping him navigate a 'challenging life'
dailyNews.description: Country star Luke Bryan credits his Baptist church upbringing and small-town values for helping him navigate the many challenges of fame and stardom.

dailyNews.title: Young brothers find human skull near creek; dozens more bones discovered in deadly mystery
dailyNews.description: Two young brothers playing near a South Carolina creek discovered a human skull and roughly 45 bones, prompting a death investigation by authorities.

dailyNews.title: Indiana tightens rules on migrant truckers, requires visas and English proficiency
dailyNews.description: Indiana is revoking CDLs for immigrants lacking valid work visas, with licenses expiring Wednesday. Employers who knowingly hire illegal drivers face a $50,000 fine.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he will attend Supreme Court oral arguments on birthright citizenship challenge
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says he may attend Supreme Court arguments on his birthright citizenship order, which he claims was never meant to cover children of illegal immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Aaron Glenn backs Geno Smith to lead Jets to 'promised land' despite latest interception-riddled season
dailyNews.description: Aaron Glenn said Geno Smith is positioned to lead the New York Jets to the "promised land" despite the quarterback throwing an NFL-leading 17 interceptions last season.

dailyNews.title: Don Lemon talks possibility of being president, says he'd be 'a lot better than Donald Trump'

dailyNews.title: Trump Redefines ‘Regime Change’ in Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump and his aides have made contradictory statements on whether the United States and Israel have transformed the Iranian government through violence.

dailyNews.title: Will $4 Gas Hurt Trump’s Approval Ratings? Here’s What History Shows.
dailyNews.description: Presidents since at least the Carter administration have seen their approval ratings tied to gas prices. But there are signs the correlation may be weakening.

dailyNews.title: Backdoor Funding of Homeland Security Agency Could Weaken Congress Anew
dailyNews.description: An emerging Republican plan to skirt a Democratic filibuster and fund an entire department without congressional appropriations would be the latest example of surrendering power to the White House.

dailyNews.title: Trump says allies must "come in and take care of" Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump told CBS News that he is not ready "quite yet" to abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz amid the Iran war, despite a Truth Social post suggesting allies need to do it themselves.

dailyNews.title: Trump advisers fear GOP midterm losses as gas prices spike
dailyNews.description: White House officials have been trying to drum up new strategies to prevent a GOP wipeout in the midterm elections.

dailyNews.title: Why the U.S. might target Iran's Kharg Island with a ground operation
dailyNews.description: President Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth have not ruled out a potential ground operation in the ongoing war with Iran. Military experts told CBS News that one of the places troops could be sent is Kharg Island, about 15 miles off the Iranian coast. CBS News national security analyst Aaron MacLean breaks it down.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs order on mail-in ballots and federally run voter lists
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long wanted to place additional restrictions on mail-in voting, which he has called "mail-in cheating."

dailyNews.title: Judge temporarily blocks construction of Trump's White House ballroom
dailyNews.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked the Trump administration's construction of a 90,000-square-foot ballroom to replace the White House's East Wing,

dailyNews.title: Ripple effects of rising oil prices on the U.S. economy
dailyNews.description: The U.S. is pressing forward with its strikes against Iran as the White House pushes for Tehran to make a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Kelly O'Grady, Eleanor Watson and Nancy Cordes report.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will leave Iran in 'two or three weeks'
Trump signs executive order limiting mail-in voting ahead of 2026 U.S. elections
dailyNews.description: Trump has put pressure on Congress to pass the SAVE America Act, a measure that would require photo identification and proof of U.S. citizenship to vote.
